brand_profile.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Lead with the outcome, not the mechanism. No jargon. No superlatives. The reader skims — the first line must earn the second. Avoid: game-changer, seamless, powerful, revolutionize.

product_knowledge.tagline: Visibility & Analytics from AI Search — and the actions to drive growth
product_knowledge.description: Searchable is an AI search optimization platform that helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines like ChatGPT and Claude, driving growth through actionable insights. It provides comprehensive tracking, optimization tools, and actionable insights to improve AI search rankings. The platform offers features such as AI visibility tracking, content optimization, technical audits, and competitive analysis to help brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines. With Searchable, brands can monitor their brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines, optimize their content for AI search, and identify areas for improvement to increase their online visibility and drive growth.

features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor your brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve your AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track your share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

features.name: Real-time Alerts
features.description: Get notified when your brand is mentioned or rankings change

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Detailed insights into traffic, citations, and performance metrics

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Improve visibility when prospects research solutions via AI
Ensure your content is cited and linked by AI engines
Get recommended by AI for local searches
Deliver AI search optimization services to clients

proof_points.text: Generated over £1 million in qualified pipeline from AI search
3x increase in content output while maintaining or improving engagement metrics

pain_points: Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines
Struggling to optimize content for AI search
Limited visibility into AI search engine understanding and ranking factors
Inability to compete with other brands in AI search results
Lack of actionable insights to improve AI search rankings
messaging_angles: Get ahead of the competition with AI search optimization
Unlock the power of AI search to drive growth and revenue
Stay ahead of the curve with the latest AI search trends and best practices
product_knowledge.target_customer: E-commerce brands, B2B software companies, content publishers, local businesses, and agencies

platform_rules_summary: 20-30 hashtags; placement: after 5 line breaks; inline hashtags: False
content_brief.benchmark_reference: SaaS engagement benchmarks for the selected format.
content_brief.reasoning: With 5 pain points and 3 proof points, a carousel can effectively showcase the problems and solutions offered by Searchable. The minimal brand tone suggests a focus on functionality, and the presence of a strong stat can be used to grab attention. Given the lack of a customer name, the content will focus on the features (6) and benefits of the product, such as getting ahead of the competition with AI search optimization. The narrative arc will take the audience through the challenges of AI search and introduce Searchable as the solution, highlighting its key features and proof points along the way.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines and struggling to optimize content for AI search
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Searchable helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines
strategy_brief.differentiator: unlike traditional SEO platforms that focus on human search engines, Searchable is specifically designed for AI search optimization
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Start by highlighting the challenges of tracking brand mentions across multiple AI engines
strategy_brief.messaging_angle_used: Get ahead of the competition with AI search optimization

instagram_content.preview_text: You're losing visibility in AI search.
instagram_content.body: Every hour you spend tracking brand mentions is an hour your competitor gains. Manual tracking is a never-ending cycle, wasting hours each sprint. Tracking brand mentions across multiple AI engines is a daily struggle. Searchable helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines. By using Searchable, brands have seen 206% share of voice improvements. With Searchable, you can optimize your content for AI search and take control of your brand's visibility. You can learn more about how Searchable can help your brand thrive in AI search.
instagram_content.full_caption:
You're losing visibility in AI search.
Every hour you spend tracking brand mentions is an hour your competitor gains. Manual tracking is a never-ending cycle, wasting hours each sprint. Tracking brand mentions across multiple AI engines is a daily struggle. Searchable helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines. By using Searchable, brands have seen 206% share of voice improvements. With Searchable, you can optimize your content for AI search and take control of your brand's visibility. You can learn more about how Searchable can help your brand thrive in AI search.

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy is easy to understand, and the mechanism of Searchable is self-explanatory, but the structure could be improved for better flow. The hook is effective in stopping the scroll, and the first line creates a sense of urgency, but it could be stronger with a more specific daily friction. The copy partially follows the writing instruction, but some sentences lead with the mechanism, and the tone is not entirely consistent, with a few sentences feeling like they are listing features rather than focusing on the outcome. The claim about 206% share of voice improvements is directly supported by the proof_point, and no statistics are invented.
